block_00: Trading Mistakes You Don’t Want to Make
block_01: On the market one can win only if someone else loses. As you probably already know, the majority of traders lose more than they win and quit for good. But you don’t have to be one of them. Learn about grave mistakes that traders make and ways to avoid them.
block_02: #1 mistake is trying to beat the market. This mistake is not only common but also extremely dangerous. What are the other four? Find out by reading the full article in our blog.
block_05: There are indicators that work OK together and then there are indicators that go together perfectly. Highest High and Lowest Low were meant for each other. Together they turn into a professional technical analysis system, precise and powerful...
block_08: In order to improve your trading skills, you will have to measure your performance, analyze trading strategies and adjust your behavior accordingly. And this is why a trading journal is so important. Learn how to create and use one of your own.
